title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Care Ratings - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Care Ratings - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Care Ratings is actively seeking a talented and motivated Risk Analyst to join our dynamic team in Nashik. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Care Ratings:
Care Ratings is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Due Diligence

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Learning & development budget
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Professional development and training programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Care Ratings!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
